title: UNICO — Add footer notice clarifying ICP Motoko + React stack

requirements.summary: Add a clear footer notice stating the deployed app runs on the Internet Computer with a Motoko backend and a React-based frontend, and do not reference Python/Django.
acceptanceCriteria: The footer displays an English sentence indicating the app uses a Motoko backend on the Internet Computer and a React frontend.
No references to Python or Django are added anywhere in the UI.
The app builds and renders without runtime errors.

file_operations.description: Update the existing footer content to include a user-facing notice sentence such as: "This application runs on the Internet Computer with a Motoko backend and a React-based frontend." Ensure the sentence is visible in the footer on all renders, and avoid adding any Python/Django mentions. Keep existing footer links and styling consistent with the current Tailwind-based layout.
